title: evolvulus sherardii
intro: Evolvulus sherardii, also known as blue daze or evolvulus, is a flowering plant species in the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Evolvulus sherardii include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Evolvulus sherardii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used topically in creams and ointments for skin issues.
